description: Represents an Apigee organization, the top-level container for all Apigee resources including API proxies, products, developers, and environments.

name.description: Output only. Name of the Apigee organization.

projectId.description: Output only. Project ID associated with the organization.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the organization was created in milliseconds since epoch.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the organization was last modified in milliseconds since epoch.

subscriptionType.description: Output only. Subscription type of the organization.

state.description: Output only. State of the organization.

analyticsRegion.description: Required. Primary Google Cloud region for analytics data storage.

runtimeType.description: Required. Runtime type of the Apigee organization.

authorizedNetwork.description: VPC network used for service networking.

environments.description: Output only. List of environments in the organization.

properties.description: A collection of key-value property pairs.

name: Apigee Organization
